2604.22903.title: On the Complementarity of Quantum and Classical Features: Adaptive Hybrid Quantum-Classical Feature Fusion for Breast Cancer Classification
2604.22903.paper_summary: The integration of quantum machine learning with classical deep learning offers promising avenues for medical image analysis by mapping data into high-dimensional Hilbert spaces. However, effectively unifying these distinct paradigms remains challenging due to common optimization asymmetries. In this paper, a novel hybrid quantum-classical architecture for breast cancer diagnosis based on a dual-branch feature-extraction pipeline is proposed. Our framework extracts and unifies complementary representations from classical models and quantum circuits, exploring both trainable and deterministic (non-trainable) quantum paradigms. To integrate these embeddings, three progressive feature fusion strategies are introduced: Static Hybrid Fusion (SHF) for offline extraction, Dynamic Hybrid Fusion (DHF) for end-to-end co-adaptation, and a novel Temperature-Scaled Hybrid Fusion (TSHF). The TSHF strategy incorporates a learnable scalar, inspired by multimodal learning, that dynamically balances hybrid gradient dynamics and resolves optimization bottlenecks. Empirical validation on the BreastMNIST dataset confirms our hypothesis that unifying diverse feature representations creates a richer data context. The TSHF strategy, specifically when pairing a ResNet backbone with a trainable quantum circuit, achieved a peak accuracy of 87.82%, F1-score of 91.77%, and an AUC-ROC of 89.08%, outperforming purely classical baselines. These results demonstrate that the proposed hybrid framework improves classification accuracy and threshold reliability, providing a stable, high-performance architecture for the clinical deployment of quantum-enhanced diagnostic tools.
2604.22903.paper_summary_zh: 量子機器學習與經典深度學習的整合為醫學影像分析提供了有前景的途徑，通過將數據映射到高維的希爾伯特空間。然而，由於常見的優化不對稱性，將這些不同的範式有效地統一仍然具有挑戰性。在本文中，提出了一種基於雙分支特徵提取管道的乳腺癌診斷新型混合量子-經典架構。我們的框架從經典模型和量子電路中提取並統一互補的表示，探索可訓練和確定性（不可訓練）量子範式。為了整合這些嵌入，提出了三種漸進的特徵融合策略：靜態混合融合（SHF）用於離線提取，動態混合融合（DHF）用於端到端的共同適應，以及一種新穎的溫度縮放混合融合（TSHF）。TSHF策略結合了一個可學習的標量，受到多模態學習的啟發，動態平衡混合梯度動力學並解決優化瓶頸。在BreastMNIST數據集上的實證驗證確認了我們的假設，即統一多樣的特徵表示創造了更豐富的數據上下文。當將ResNet主幹與可訓練的量子電路配對時，TSHF策略達到了87.82%的峰值準確率、91.77%的F1分數和89.08%的AUC-ROC，超越了純經典基準。這些結果表明，所提出的混合框架提高了分類準確性和閾值可靠性，為量子增強診斷工具的臨床部署提供了一個穩定的高性能架構。
2604.22903.author: Yasmin Rodrigues Sobrinho et.al.
2604.22903.authors: Yasmin Rodrigues Sobrinho, João Renato Ribeiro Manesco, João Paulo Papa
